'''zhachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:utmostly|utmostly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utmostly|utmostly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhachate|zhachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhachatesher|zhachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhachatesherĂ«m|zhachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhachatero|zhachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhachateshĂ«|zhachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhachateshĂ«m|zhachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhachatero|gokizhachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhachateshĂ«|gokizhachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhachateshĂ«m|gokizhachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhachankerom|gozhachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhachankeshĂ«|gozhachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhachankeshĂ«m|gozhachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhachankeya|gozhachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhachaterom|zhachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhachatemu|zhachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhachateya|zhachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhachaterom|gokizhachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhachatemu|gokizhachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhachateya|gokizhachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhachachate|zhachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhachachatesher|zhachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhachachatesherĂ«m|zhachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhachachatero|zhachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhachachateshĂ«|zhachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhachachateshĂ«m|zhachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhachachatero|gokizhachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhachachateshĂ«|gokizhachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhachachateshĂ«m|gokizhachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhachachankerom|gozhachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhachachankeshĂ«|gozhachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhachachankeshĂ«m|gozhachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhachachankeya|gozhachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhachachaterom|zhachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhachachatemu|zhachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhachachateya|zhachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhachachaterom|gokizhachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhachachatemu|gokizhachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhachachateya|gokizhachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠte|zhĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠtesher|zhĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠtero|zhĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠchĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠterom|zhĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠtemu|zhĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠchĂŠteya|zhĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠchĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠchĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafchafte|zhafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafchaftesher|zhafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafchaftesherĂ«m|zhafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafchaftero|zhafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafchafteshĂ«|zhafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafchafteshĂ«m|zhafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafchaftero|gokizhafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafchafteshĂ«|gokizhafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafchafteshĂ«m|gokizhafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafchafnkerom|gozhafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafchafnkeshĂ«|gozhafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafchafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafchafnkeya|gozhafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafchafterom|zhafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafchaftemu|zhafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafchafteya|zhafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafchafterom|gokizhafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafchaftemu|gokizhafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafchafteya|gokizhafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
